official_functions.role: Construct the official custom click action id used by the packet fixture
Construct the official optional custom click action payload fixture
Construct the official Configuration serverbound custom_click_action packet
Write the official Configuration serverbound custom_click_action body
Write the full Configuration serverbound framed custom_click_action packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration serverbound framed custom_click_action packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration serverbound state
Read the decoded id and optional payload fields from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration serverbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the custom_click_action body.
The official Configuration serverbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ServerboundCustomClickActionPacket.
The decoded official ServerboundCustomClickActionPacket preserves the Identifier and optional Tag payload produced by the official fixture constructors.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded id, decoded payload fields, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove UI behavior, command execution, interaction readiness, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer UI behavior, command execution, interaction readiness, Configuration-to-Play readiness, or Play readiness.
